common.privacyNotice: Your API key and data are stored locally in your browser to ensure privacy. If you have any questions or suggestions, please contact us via the community or feedback page.
common.dragAndDropText: Click or drag file here to upload
common.noTargetLanguage: Select at least one target language.
common.singleFileModeTooltip: Keep only one file; new uploads replace the current file
common.hideResultsTooltip: Hide result preview to prevent page lag from large content
common.directExportTooltip: Automatically download after processing, skipping result preview
common.useCacheTooltip: Reuse previous translation cache to speed up processing
common.contextAwareTranslationTooltip: Translate with context for better coherence and accuracy (AI models only)
common.multiLanguageModeTooltip: Translate to multiple languages simultaneously, saved as separate files
common.resetUploadTooltip: Clear current input and uploaded files
common.sameLanguageTarget: Source and target languages are the same; automatically adjusted target to
common.sameLanguageSource: Source and target languages are the same; automatically adjusted source to
common.enterApiKey: Enter API Key or switch to Free API.
common.enterApiUrl: Please configure the API URL in 'API Settings'.
common.deepLXUnavailable: DeepLX service is temporarily unreachable, automatically switched to GTX API (Free).
common.deeplUnavailable: DeepL service is temporarily unreachable, please check the related settings in API Settings.
common.llmUnavailable: LLM service is temporarily unreachable, please check the related settings in API Settings.
common.noFileUploaded: Please upload a file to process first.
common.sourceTextPlaceholder: Enter or paste text to process...
common.noSourceText: Please enter or paste text content.
common.formatTooltip: Format: remove blank lines and trim leading/trailing spaces
common.resultToSourceTooltip: Overwrite input area with result text
common.readOnlyModeTooltip: Text is too long: the editor is temporarily read-only and shows a partial preview only. Your full content is unaffected — processing and export still use the entire text.
common.clearInputTooltip: Clear input content and uploaded files
common.removeCharsAfterTranslationTooltip: Automatically remove specified characters after translation (separate multiple with spaces)
common.multiLangSettingsHint: Enter language codes, separated by comma or space.
common.retryCountTooltip: Number of retry attempts when translation fails
common.requestTimeoutSecTooltip: Maximum wait per request (seconds). LLM thinking takes longer; 180s or more recommended.
common.customExportFilenameTooltip: '{'name'}' = original filename, '{'lang'}' = language, '{'ext'}' = extension, '{'date'}' = date, '{'time'}' = time
common.partialFailureDesc: Failed lines kept the original text as a placeholder, so the file stays usable. These failures are usually network blips or temporary upstream hiccups — free services and self-hosted servers are especially prone to this, and it's not a problem with your setup. Click Retry to continue (successful lines come from cache, no re-translation); if it still fails, try again later or switch to a different translation service. Or click View failed lines to handle them manually.
common.failedLanguagesDesc: Every batch for these languages errored out — usually local LLM glitches, API rate limits, or the model refusing a specific language. Copy the codes and re-run targeting only them (paste into Quick Entry via Language Codes); the others will hit cache and skip.
common.gtxFreeAPIUnavailable: GTX Free service is temporarily unreachable — could be a network restriction. Please try again later, or switch to a different translation service.
common.translategemmaUnavailable: TranslateGemma service is temporarily unreachable, please make sure your local server (LM Studio / llama.cpp / Ollama) is running and the URL is correct.
common.networkUnavailable: Translation service is temporarily unreachable — could be a network issue or the service is having a hiccup. Please try again later, or switch to a different translation service.
common.translationTimeout: Translation request timed out — could be a slow network or the service is taking too long to respond. Please try again later, or switch to a different translation service.

novelProcessor.title: Chinese Novel Formatter
novelProcessor.description: One-click formatting for downloaded Chinese web novels — smart line breaks, chapter splitting, and clean layout.
novelProcessor.metaTitle: Chinese Web Novel TXT Formatter - Chapter Split, Kindle Export
novelProcessor.metaDescription: Chinese web novel TXT formatter: fix broken paragraphs, ads, 第X章 chapters, and Simplified/Traditional mix in one click. Handles 3M+ chars. Exports Kindle, Kobo, FBReader.

faq.q: My downloaded TXT novel has messy formatting — what issues can this tool fix?
faq.a: Fixes 7 common web-novel TXT problems: paragraphs broken into short lines, extra blank lines at paragraph ends, chapter headings missing line breaks, missing paragraph indentation, ad lines mixed in, inconsistent full-width/half-width spaces, and mixed Traditional/Simplified characters. Works for browser copy-paste, Word-exported TXT, fanfic compilations, and more. Check the rules you need and batch-fix in one pass; each rule can also be enabled individually. Supports novels of 3 million+ characters without slowdown.

faq.q: Can the formatted TXT be used directly with Kindle, FBReader, and other e-readers?
faq.a: Processed TXT meets the format requirements of Kindle (push email), FBReader, and other readers. Enabling "Chapter Split" adds a blank line before each chapter so Kindle can auto-generate a table of contents. TTS users can enable "Remove Duplicate Lines" and "Junk Filter" to avoid the reader speaking ad content.

faq.q: My novel is in Traditional Chinese (Taiwan/HK) and I want Simplified — or I want to keep specific names from…
faq.a: This tool includes a Traditional ↔ Simplified rule you can enable during formatting. For finer control — a protected-words dictionary (names, places, terminology) and conversion between Taiwan Traditional ↔ Hong Kong Traditional ↔ Japanese Shinjitai — chain with [Chinese Converter](../chinese-conversion); both tools share the same protected-words format. For further regex search/replace, chapter extraction, or sensitive-word filtering, the [Text Toolbox](../text-toolbox) closes the loop.

faq.q: Will the tool accidentally delete actual story content or dialogue? How does duplicate detection work?
faq.a: Duplicate detection only targets content that appears identically on 3 or more consecutive lines (e.g. a repeated ad like "First published at xxx"). Short character responses like "Yes" or "Mm" in the body text are never removed, because the algorithm detects consecutive repetition, not single-line duplicates. Back up the original before processing; a body word-count change of less than 5% after processing confirms safety. Chapter splitting uses regex to match patterns like "Chapter X", "Chapter X", "X." and similar common formats.

faq.q: Is my novel uploaded to a server? Is the tool open source?
faq.a: 100% browser-local: text reading, format repair, Traditional/Simplified conversion, and export all happen in your browser — nothing is uploaded. Source code is open on GitHub (rockbenben/novel-processor) for self-hosting.

howto.name: Import web novel or fiction text
howto.text: Paste text or upload a TXT file — no size limit, handles novels over 3 million characters. Works for TXT downloads from sites like Biquge, browser web copy, Word TXT exports, fan fiction, original writing, and more.

howto.name: Configure repair rule combinations
howto.text: Check the rules you need: smart line breaks (fix mis-split paragraphs), chapter splitting (blank line before each chapter), first-line indent (2 chars), duplicate-line removal (strip ads), Traditional-to-Simplified conversion, junk content filter. Rules stack, or enable individually.

howto.name: Export reader-friendly TXT
howto.text: Send the export directly to Kindle via send-to-email, or import locally into Kobo, FBReader, or Moon+ Reader. With chapter splitting enabled, Kindle auto-generates a table of contents. For Kobo or non-Kindle readers, convert to EPUB via Calibre first for the best TOC experience.

features: Fixes 7 common format issues in web novel TXT files (downloads, web copy-paste, Word exports)
Auto-detects chapter titles like 「第X章」 or Chapter X and splits them
Adjacent duplicate-line detection — identical consecutive lines like repeated ad banners are removed
First-line indent (2 chars), strips extra blank lines, repairs mis-split short lines
Handles novels over 3 million characters with fast processing
Compatible with Kindle Send-to-Email, Kobo, FBReader, and Moon+ Reader

CopyToClipboard.unsupported: Browser does not support clipboard, please copy manually

NovelProcessor.description: Designed for formatting Chinese web novels, fixing layout issues from downloaded text in one click. Features smart line breaks, 第X章 chapter splitting, paragraph indentation, Simplified/Traditional conversion, duplicate-line removal, and junk-content filtering — turning messy novel text into clean, readable content.
NovelProcessor.errorNoInput: Please enter or paste text to process
NovelProcessor.errorNoFile: Please upload a file to process
NovelProcessor.warningNoText: Please enter or paste text first
NovelProcessor.infoNoChapters: No valid chapter headings detected, reorder unavailable
NovelProcessor.chapterSplit: Put chapter titles on their own line
NovelProcessor.rulesInactiveHint: Active only when Traditional/Simplified conversion is enabled
NovelProcessor.hintSmartLineBreak: Rejoin paragraphs that were broken across multiple lines
NovelProcessor.hintParagraphSplit: Split overly long paragraphs by sentence for easier reading on mobile
NovelProcessor.hintChapterSplit: Move a chapter heading stuck on the same line as the body text onto its own line
NovelProcessor.hintMergeChapterTitles: When the same chapter title appears more than once, keep only one
NovelProcessor.hintLineEndNumbers: Remove stray page numbers or digits at the end of each line
NovelProcessor.hintSpecialStart: Lines starting with this text will not be merged into the previous paragraph
NovelProcessor.hintFilter: Delete lines that contain these keywords
NovelProcessor.hintThreshold: Lines longer than this many characters are kept even if they contain a keyword (0 = off)
NovelProcessor.tooltipChapterSplitOnly: Chapter Split Only: split on chapter headings only, do not modify other content
NovelProcessor.tooltipChapterReorder: Chapter Reorder: reorder the entire novel by chapter numbers

ProtectedRuleManager.description: Rules take priority over the built-in dictionary — matched terms are not converted by OpenCC. On import, duplicate source entries are automatically removed (the last one wins).
ProtectedRuleManager.confirmClearAll: Clear all rules for the current direction?
ProtectedRuleManager.importHint: Import supports OpenCC format text (each line: key[TAB]value, lines starting with # are comments). Rules are appended to the current direction; duplicate sources are removed automatically.
ProtectedRuleManager.puaSanitized: PUA characters (internal placeholder range) automatically removed
ProtectedRuleManager.importNoRules: No valid rules found in file (OpenCC format: each line key[TAB]value)
ProtectedRuleManager.importedWithDedup: Imported {added} rule(s) to {direction}, automatically removed {dedup} duplicate source(s)
ProtectedRuleManager.shadowedTooltip: Shadowed by row {rowNumber}; effective result is "{winnerTo}"
ProtectedRuleManager.emptyTable: No rules yet. Click "Add Rule" to get started.
ProtectedRuleManager.enableProtectedRulesTooltip: When off, the rules below are ignored for this conversion
ProtectedRuleManager.customReplaceTooltip: Matched terms bypass the OpenCC built-in dictionary; managed separately by direction (Simplified → Traditional / Traditional → Simplified)

feedback.feedback2: If you encounter issues or have suggestions, let me know! Your feedback drives future development and helps us build better tools for everyone.
feedback.feedback3: Please describe your use case, issue, or creative idea. I read every message and will respond/optimize as soon as possible.
feedback.placeholder: Leave a message (no login required, email optional for reply)
